label.name: Name
label.autoCreate: Auto create objects if not exist

placeholder.name: Name
placeholder.stateRole: e.g. state, value, sensor - Leave empty to use msg.stateRole
placeholder.stateUnit: e.g. °C, %, kWh - Leave empty to use msg.stateUnit
placeholder.stateMin: Minimum value - Leave empty to use msg.stateMin
placeholder.stateMax: Maximum value - Leave empty to use msg.stateMax

treeview.fallbackMessage: TreeView component not available. Manual input only.

autoCreate.title: Object Auto-Creation:
autoCreate.description: If enabled, missing objects will be created automatically with the specified properties. Properties can be configured below or passed via message properties (msg.stateName, msg.stateRole, etc.).

help.description: ioBroker state output via WebSocket with optional automatic object creation capability.
help.stateDescription: The ioBroker state ID. If empty, msg.topic is used.
help.inputPropertyDescription: The message property containing the value to set (default: payload).
help.setModeDescription: Value (ack=true): Sets the state as a confirmed value. Command (ack=false): Sets the state as a command for devices.
help.autoCreateDescription: When enabled, this node will automatically create missing ioBroker objects before setting their values.
help.staticConfigurationDescription: Set object properties in the node configuration
help.dynamicConfigurationDescription: Override properties using message properties (msg.stateName, msg.stateRole, etc.)
